OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Updates Clinician record with Board Certifications And HealthCare Taxonomies.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianUpdateClinicianRecordIP

childElements.name: DMExtractTaxonomyCode
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : false, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMExtractTaxonomyCode", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "taxanomiesFromNPPES", "element" : "taxanomiesFromNPPES" }, { "inputParam" : "clinicianRecordId", "element" : "clinicianDetails:PersonContactId" } ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "isActive" : true, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { }, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ListActionSetPrimaryTaxonomyList
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : false, "useFormulas" : false, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "ListUpdateTaxonomyHC", "matchingPath" : "TaxonomyCode", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "taxanomiesFromNPPES", "matchingPath" : "code", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : false, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "ListUpdateTaxonomyHC", "taxanomiesFromNPPES" ], "filterListFormula" : "HCTaxonomyId != null", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { "primary" : "=IF(primary==true, true, false)", "Name" : "=IF(ISBLANK(Name), desc, Name)" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "isActive" : true, "id" : "", "internalNotes" : "", "postActionLogging" : "", "preActionLogging" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "restOptions" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction4" }

childElements.name: ListUpdateTaxonomyHC
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : false, "useFormulas" : false, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "DMExtractTaxonomyCode:taxonomyCare", "matchingPath" : "TaxonomyCode", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "DMExtractTaxonomyCode:HCTaxonomyList", "matchingPath" : "TaxonomyCode", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : false, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DMExtractTaxonomyCode:taxonomyCare", "DMExtractTaxonomyCode:HCTaxonomyList" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { "TaxonomyId" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TaxonomyId), Id, TaxonomyId)" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "isActive" : true, "id" : "", "internalNotes" : "", "postActionLogging" : "", "preActionLogging" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "restOptions" : { } }

childElements.name: LoadClinicianRecordWithTaxAndCertsNew
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "casedLastNameFromNPPES" : "=%casedLastNameFromNPPES%", "NPPESBasic" : "=%basicInformationFromNPPES%", "casedMiddleNameFromNPPES" : "=%casedMiddleNameFromNPPES%", "ContextId" : "=%clinicianRecordId%", "casedFirstNameFromNPPES" : "=%casedFirstNameFromNPPES%", "TaxonomiesToBeUpserted" : "=%ListActionSetPrimaryTaxonomyList%", "NPINumber" : "=%enteredNPINumber%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadClinicianRecordWithTaxAndCertsNew", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "internalNotes" : "", "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { } }
